tldr: Move from Basis Theory's portable card vault to Yuno's multi-PSP payments orchestration with built-in routing.
why_switch: Need smart routing and conversion optimization across PSPs out of the box
Strong fit for LatAm/global PSP coverage that Yuno specializes in
Reduce in-house orchestration code by adopting a unified API
Centralize PSP analytics rather than wiring vault to bespoke routing
Keep relatively low lock-in via the orchestration abstraction
what_to_export: PSP credentials and configuration in use
Encryption key rotation history (per Basis Theory guidance)
export_method: Enumerate tokens and configs through Basis Theory's API and console. Raw card data cannot be self-exported — coordinate a PCI-compliant vault-to-vault transfer with both Basis Theory and Yuno. Archive proxy/reactor definitions and webhook configs as JSON. Confirm the exact handshake with Basis Theory's official migration guidance.
import_method: Onboard with Yuno, connect the PSPs you already use, then coordinate the card vault transfer. Re-create routing logic in Yuno's rules and re-implement client/server integration against Yuno's unified API. Update webhook endpoints. Dual-run with Basis Theory for at least one billing cycle to validate parity. Verify endpoints in current Yuno official docs.

concept_mapping.note: Use Yuno's native routing instead of custom reactors
PSP integrations are first-class in Yuno
Replace bespoke logic with Yuno SDK calls
Yuno pricing is not transparent — request a quote

gotchas: PCI-compliant vault-to-vault migration is mandatory; never move raw PANs yourself
Yuno pricing is opaque — get a written rate card before committing
Routing-rule parity with your current custom logic needs careful test coverage
Confirm Yuno's PSP coverage matches every processor you use today
Webhook payload shapes differ; downstream consumers need updates
Plan a full dual-run cycle before decommissioning Basis Theory

email.subject: Migration plan: Basis Theory to Yuno
email.body:
Hi team,

I'd like to consolidate from Basis Theory to Yuno. Today we run Basis Theory as a portable vault plus our own orchestration on top — Yuno gives us multi-PSP routing, retries, and a unified API as a product, with strong LatAm coverage.

Plan: enumerate tokens/configs, coordinate a PCI-compliant vault transfer with both vendors, rebuild routing rules in Yuno, dual-run for one billing cycle, cut over. Estimated 4-10 weeks.

Before commit: written quote from Yuno (their pricing isn't public), confirmation that all our current PSPs are first-class in their connector list, and an integration spike to validate DX.

OK to move forward?
